name: Oatmeal Cookies LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper.
3. In a large bowl, mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together butter, applesauce, sugars, egg, and vanilla until the butter breaks into pea-sized pieces.
5. Add the flour mixture to the applesauce mixture. Mix well.
6. Fold in oats and raisins.
7. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto the cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on the sheet for 5 minutes.
10. Cool completely on a rack.
